items.title: [Steam论坛] New Player Handbook Guide
items.summary:
This is a very comprehensive guide for new and returning players https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.kxd9lri5r74q.
It contains about everything you could need for a good start and links to other important resources (in the future, it could also be found on a dedicated site).
Free to ask on Discord if in need of anything....
